results.title: Perez sees tricky Monaco track as an opportunity for ‘slower’ Cadillac
results.description: Surprises can happen despite a reputation for processional racing and the risk of crashing

results.title: Coroner gives verdict on sudden death of 26-year-old man at house in Maple Avenue, Thornton
results.description: Luke Drinkwater was treated by paramedics at an address in Maple Avenue, Thornton after being called by a friend in the early hours of January 22 this year but couldn’t be saved.
